---
title: "People"
description: "Faculty, researchers, and graduate students."
---

## Faculty

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.person-card}
### 👤 Krisna Gupta
**Director · Associate Professor**

Development economics, international trade, and applied econometrics.
PhD from Australian National University.

[GitHub](https://github.com/imedkrisna) · [krisna@ui.ac.id](mailto:krisna@ui.ac.id)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.person-card}
### 👤 Siti Aminah
**Associate Professor**

Public finance, fiscal decentralisation, and local governance.
PhD from University of Groningen.

[s.aminah@ui.ac.id](mailto:s.aminah@ui.ac.id)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.person-card}
### 👤 Budi Santoso
**Assistant Professor**

Labour economics, education, and human capital.
PhD from Erasmus University Rotterdam.

[b.santoso@ui.ac.id](mailto:b.santoso@ui.ac.id)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.person-card}
### 👤 Dinda Rachmania
**Assistant Professor**

Environmental economics, climate policy, and computable general equilibrium modelling.
PhD from Kyoto University.

[d.rachmania@ui.ac.id](mailto:d.rachmania@ui.ac.id)
:::
:::

:::

---

## Researchers & Postdocs

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.person-card}
### 👤 Arya Pratama
**Research Fellow**

International trade, global value chains, and firm-level productivity.

[a.pratama@ui.ac.id](mailto:a.pratama@ui.ac.id)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.person-card}
### 👤 Yudo Prabowo
**Research Fellow**

Labour economics, informal sector, and distributional analysis.

[y.prabowo@ui.ac.id](mailto:y.prabowo@ui.ac.id)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.person-card}
### 👤 Anisa Widyani
**Research Associate**

Digital economy, fintech, and financial inclusion in rural Indonesia.

[a.widyani@ui.ac.id](mailto:a.widyani@ui.ac.id)
:::
:::

:::

---

## Graduate Students

*PhD and Master's students affiliated with the lab*

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.person-card}
### 👤 Rizky Aditya
**PhD Student**

Causal inference methods applied to poverty measurement.
Supervisor: Krisna Gupta.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.person-card}
### 👤 Maya Sari
**PhD Student**

Tax compliance and behavioural economics.
Supervisor: Siti Aminah.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.person-card}
### 👤 Gilang Nugraha
**Master's Student**

Energy subsidy reform and household welfare.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.person-card}
### 👤 Putri Handayani
**Master's Student**

Gender wage gap and occupational segregation.
:::
:::

:::

---

## Join the Lab

We welcome applications from motivated PhD and Master's students, postdoctoral researchers,
and visiting scholars. If you are interested in working with us, please reach out via the
contact form.

[Get in Touch](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
